reasoning: To resolve YES, Abdusattorov's rating must increase by at least 1% from its October 2025 value of 2750. This equates to an increase of 27.5 points, meaning his rating must be at least 2777.5. For an elite player at 2750, gaining 27.5 points within 1–3 months is exceedingly difficult, as the K-factor is 10 and players face strong opposition. Gaining 28 points requires outperforming expected scores by around 2.8 points (e.g., scoring ~7.5/9 against fellow 2750s), which happens only during historic tournament performances. There is no evidence of Abdusattorov achieving such a massive winning streak in October 2025, which makes the November dates (Nov 2 and Nov 25), reflecting the same November rating list, highly improbable (assigned 0.05). Even extending the horizon to January 2026, he would have to surpass his all-time peak (~2768) significantly. Given the short timeframe and the immense difficulty of jumping from 2750 to ~2778, the probability remains very low, though slightly higher for the January date due to a wider window of opportunity for a spectacular performance (0.09).
